books.title: Atomic Habits
books.description: A practical playbook for building good habits and breaking bad ones with small repeated actions.

books.description: A guide to focused work and attention management in a distracted world.

books.description: A landmark book on decision-making, bias, and the two systems of thought.

books.description: A direct, modern self-help book on choosing what actually matters.

books.description: A self-help and personal-development pick in mindset & spirituality, first published in 1997. Evergreen spiritual/personal freedom self-help title.

books.title: Mindset
